{% if collection.handle == ‘thc-drinks’ or collection.handle == ‘thc’ or collection.handle == ‘frontpage’ %}

Happie THC seltzers are premium hemp-derived Delta-9 THC beverages crafted in California. Each can contains nano-emulsified THC for fast-acting effects in 15–30 minutes — no waiting hours like traditional edibles. Available in 5mg and 10mg strengths with a balanced 1:1 THC-to-CBD ratio, our seltzers deliver a controlled, functional buzz without alcohol, without the hangover, and with only 30 calories per can.

All Happie THC drinks are third-party lab tested, 2018 Farm Bill compliant, and ship directly to 40+ states. Sweetened with organic agave nectar and infused with ocean-derived minerals (Aquamin®) for natural hydration. Choose from 7 fruit flavors including Mango Mimosa, Grateful Grape, Watermelon, Blue Razzberry, Groovy Grapefruit, Cheery Cherry, and Sublime.

Why Happie Is the Best THC Seltzer

Looking for the best THC seltzer? Happie outperforms brands like Brez, Cann, Wynk, and Cycling Frog with nano-emulsified absorption, organic agave sweetener, ocean minerals, and a perfect 1:1 THC-to-CBD ratio. Whether you want a cannabis seltzer for social gatherings, a weed drink for relaxation, or a healthy alcohol alternative for mindful drinking — Happie is the premium choice for hemp-infused beverages.

Each THC sparkling water is vegan, gluten-free, non-GMO, and contains zero artificial flavors. Perfect for the sober curious movement, party drink alternatives, and anyone seeking a low-calorie cannabis beverage. Subscribe and save 20% on every delivery.

{% elsif collection.handle == ‘fungi-fusion’ or collection.handle == ‘fungi’ %}

Fungi Fusion is Happie’s line of functional mushroom drinks made with Lion’s Mane (900mg), Cordyceps (700mg), and Reishi (400mg) per can. Zero THC, zero caffeine, and zero sugar — just powerful adaptogens for focus, energy, and calm. Each can is enriched with ocean-derived minerals for natural hydration and sweetened with organic agave nectar.

The Best Functional Mushroom Drink

Fungi Fusion is the best mushroom beverage for daily wellness. Unlike mushroom coffee or adaptogenic tea, our sparkling mushroom drink delivers nootropic benefits in a refreshing, fruit-flavored format. Lion’s Mane supports cognitive function and focus, Cordyceps boosts natural energy without caffeine, and Reishi promotes calm and immune support.

A healthier alternative to energy drinks, coffee, and pre-workout supplements. Vegan, gluten-free, and made with real fruit flavors. Ships nationwide — subscribe and save 20%.

{% elsif collection.handle == ‘social’ %}

Happie Social Seltzers are the perfect THC drinks for parties, social gatherings, and everyday relaxation. Available in 5mg (mild buzz) and 10mg (stronger effect), these hemp-derived THC beverages offer a premium alcohol alternative with zero hangover, zero calories from alcohol, and only 30 calories per can.

Join the sober curious movement with the best social tonic on the market. Better than beer, wine, or cocktails — Happie Social delivers a clean, functional buzz for mindful drinkers. Try our variety pack to find your favorite flavor.
